svg.text: SSL termination · HTTP→HTTPS redirect · Path-based routing · Health probes
Self-signed TLS cert · min_capacity=0 autoscale · Public IP: gateway-pip
Serves built Vue static files · port 80
try_files for Vue Router · gzip · cache headers
All containers share Docker network: backend-network
Routes traffic → Azure Cache for Redis (external)
Private Subnet — 10.0.2.0/24 · No public IPs · Delegated to PostgreSQL
SSL only · port 6380 · no public access
Reached via private endpoint NIC in public subnet
Book cover images · public blob access
All inbound internet traffic enters only through Application Gateway (ports 80/443). SSH (port 22) direct to VM public IPs. Database and Redis have no public IPs.
